steps.title: Write $f$ in factored form
steps.content: Since the graph passes through $(9,0)$ and $(-2,0)$, those are the roots, so $f(x)=a(x-9)(x+2)$ for some integer $a\gt 1$.

steps.title: Test each choice for an integer $a\gt 1$
steps.content:
Solve $-6a=\text{choice}$ for each:
  • $8$: $a=-\tfrac{4}{3}$, not an integer $\gt 1$.
  • $7$: $a=-\tfrac{7}{6}$, not an integer $\gt 1$.
  • $-6$: $a=1$, not greater than $1$.
  • $-12$: $a=2$, an integer greater than $1$.
D is correct.
